candidates.why: Non-operating/financial revenue, not core sales.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses arising from accounts payable and taxes
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list: prefer pure interest expense labels first, then broader financial expenses as fallback. Excluded Other financial expenses because it is less clearly interest-only.

candidates.why: Only clear equity line available; suitable for book equity when no parent-only equity line exists.
Balancing/subtotal helper row, not a reported equity measure.

candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total assets/liabilities+equity, not book equity.

variables.notes: No parent/owners-only equity line is shown, so use Total equity for BE. Per rule, MIB is set to [] to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income subtotal, not balance sheet minority interest / non-controlling interests.

variables.notes: No balance sheet non-controlling interests/minority interest line is present. Since BE uses Total equity, MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
